features: Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.1.29 — time picker overhaul.

No more lag: The duration preview now fires on the input event (every keystroke / scroll wheel change) instead of change (which only fired after you clicked away). The preview appears the instant you set a time.

Selection now visible: Time inputs now use color-scheme: dark so the native browser clock popup renders in dark mode correctly. The clock icon is tinted blue with a hover highlight. In light mode the picker switches to color-scheme: light automatically.
Visual redesign: The ⏱ Session Time section now has a blue-tinted border, a Start → End arrow layout, and the calculated duration appears in a highlighted pill badge above the manual duration fields.
Edit modal pre-shows duration: When you open Edit Session, the duration badge is shown immediately from the existing start/end times — no need to re-select anything.
No stacking listeners: Re-opening the Edit Session modal no longer stacks up duplicate event handlers — handlers are assigned via oninput/onchange properties which auto-replace on each open.
